eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL DANGER WARNING for the following counties or areas: Travis; Williamson; Hays, TX; at 01:22 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 01:22 AM MAY 18, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Austin PD: Shelter in place inside these 4 major roadways: South Slaughter Ln, East McKinney Falls Pkwy, North Ben White Blvd., West Escarpment Blvd. due to ongoing law enforcement incident. Effective until further notice. Visit Austin Police social media (X, FB, IG) for updates and to stay informed.
